steps.title: Set up the total cost expression
steps.content:
Shirts cost \$15 each and pants cost \$25 each. If Geoff buys s shirts and p pairs of pants, the total spent is:
$$15s + 25p$$

steps.title: Translate the spending constraint
steps.content:
Geoff can spend at most \$120. The phrase at most means the total spending cannot exceed \$120, which translates to $\le$:
$$15s + 25p \le 120$$
That confirms A is correct.
